title: fumana glutinosa f. juniperina
intro: Fumana glutinosa f. juniperina, also known as the juniper-leafed rockrose or fumana juniperina, is a shrub that belongs to the cistus family. The plant is native to the Mediterranean region and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. Fumana glutinosa f. juniperina is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
